case_title: EVANGELINA VALADEZ MARTIN VS. CARMEN OROPEZA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, EVANGELINA VALADEZ AS TO DEFENDANT OROPEZA, CARMEN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, EVANGELINA VALADEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OROPEZA, CARMEN AN INDIVIDUAL $14,746.18 PRINCIPAL, $191.61 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,307.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
